title: 8 Herbal Creams For Anxiety
description: Avena sativa creams contains the bioactive constituents avenanthramides, gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA), and ferulic acid. These compounds have a calming effect on the body by reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Avenanthramides have antioxidant properties, which help to soothe the nervous system and reduce anxiety. GABA, a neurotransmitter, helps to regulate brain activity and calm the mind.
